vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. The 'String of Nickels' (P1) and 'Mexican Mint' (P2) are not visible as healthy specimens. The 'Pothos' (P3) and 'Silver Guest' (P4) are obscured or absent.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible foliage in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible foliage in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is not visible.
inventory_reconciliation.New_Intervention: Introduction of a metallic spoon in the P1/P2 vicinity (T-1 to Current).

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface. No signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3_Pothos_Pot: White rabbit anchor remains, but the plant is absent or completely collapsed below soil level.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dark and potentially damp, but lacks any biological growth.
biome_observations.debris: A metallic spoon has been introduced into the biome near the yellow pot. White particulate matter (possibly eggshell or perlite) is visible in the P3/P4 area.

temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Lighting shift; visibility decreases, confirming lack of plant mass.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot area.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: Spoon remains; no plant growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total systemic failure regarding the registered flora. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the pots.
anomalies: Total absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots, which should contain Pothos, String of Nickels, and Mexican Mint, appear to be empty soil containers. The only significant change across the timeline is the introduction of a metallic spoon near the yellow pot. The white rabbit anchor in P3 remains, but the plant it was meant to accompany is missing. The biome is currently devoid of life.
